title: Create .env.example — document required env vars with placeholder values
description: Create .env.example documenting required environment variables: FIREFLY_URL, FIREFLY_PERSONAL_TOKEN, OPENAI_API_KEY, ENABLE_UI, PORT. Use placeholder values only (no secrets). Add comments explaining each variable. Fixes latent docs bug (runbook references .env.example but it was never committed — R-0023 Q3).
notes: R-0023 Q3 confirmed .env.example is missing (latent docs bug). Required vars per architecture env contract. ENABLE_UI=true needed for browser UAT. PORT=3000 is container-internal default; host port 3001 via compose mapping.
